---
title: useless-fallthrough
description: "Remove final-case fallthrough."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Remove final-case fallthrough. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
switch value { case 1: use(); fallthrough }
```

## Good

```go
switch value { case 1: use() }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only useless-fallthrough`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
